title: The Heart Center — Willpower & Worth
description: This center governs willpower & ego. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what the Heart center governs, and what it means for them when it is defined versus open — and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: When defined: You have reliable willpower and can make and keep promises. Your self-worth is naturally strong.
When open: Don't make promises or try to prove your worth. Your value isn't measured by productivity. Rest without guilt.
forbiddenClaims: a defined center is better, stronger, or more evolved than an open center
open centers are flaws or weaknesses to fix
you can or should change which of your centers are defined

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: The Heart Center — Willpower & Worth — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: The Heart Center — Willpower & Worth — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: The Heart Center — Willpower & Worth — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: The Heart Center — Willpower & Worth — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: The Heart Center — Willpower & Worth — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: This center governs willpower & ego. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
